allow: Bash(git -C "C:/Users/fiuv_/OneDrive/Documentos/Panini 2/.worktrees/panini-tracker-mvp" commit -m "feat: add album tracker pages")
Bash(git -C "C:/Users/fiuv_/OneDrive/Documentos/Panini 2" merge --no-ff codex/panini-tracker-mvp -m "merge: panini tracker MVP \(tasks 1-8\)")

Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml" -H "Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9" "https://www.laststicker.com/cards/panini_world_cup_2026/mex11/" -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code} size %{size_download}\\n" -o /tmp/sticker.html)

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/stickers.json'\); const bad=d.filter\(s=>s.category==='Player' && \(s.name==='Team Logo' || s.name==='Team Photo' || !s.name.trim\(\)\)\); console.log\('Players misnamed:', bad.length\); bad.slice\(0,10\).forEach\(s=>console.log\(s\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/stickers.json'\); const byCat={}; d.forEach\(s=>{byCat[s.category]=\(byCat[s.category]||0\)+1}\); console.log\('categories:', byCat\); const teams={}; d.forEach\(s=>{teams[s.team]=teams[s.team]||{logo:0,photo:0,player:0,other:0}; if\(s.category==='Team Badge'\) teams[s.team].logo++; else if\(s.category==='Team Photo'\) teams[s.team].photo++; else if\(s.category==='Player'\) teams[s.team].player++; else teams[s.team].other++}\); console.log\('\\\\nper team \(first 5\):'\); Object.entries\(teams\).slice\(0,5\).forEach\(\([t,c]\)=>console.log\(t,c\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/stickers.json'\); d.filter\(s=>s.team==='Argentina' && \(s.category==='Team Badge' || s.category==='Team Photo'\)\).forEach\(s=>console.log\(s.code, s.category, s.rarity, s.name\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/stickers.json'\); console.log\('First 10:'\); d.slice\(0,10\).forEach\(s=>console.log\(s.code, '|', s.team, '|', s.name\)\); console.log\('\\\\nCodes with FWC prefix:'\); d.filter\(s=>s.code.startsWith\('FWC'\)\).forEach\(s=>console.log\(s.code, '|', s.team, '|', s.name\)\); console.log\('\\\\nUnique team prefixes:'\); console.log\([...new Set\(d.map\(s=>s.code.match\(/^[A-Z]+/\)?.[0]\).filter\(Boolean\)\)].sort\(\).join\(' '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/stickers.json'\); console.log\('total:', d.length\); console.log\('with imageUrl:', d.filter\(s=>s.imageUrl\).length\); console.log\('without imageUrl:', d.filter\(s=>!s.imageUrl\).length\); console.log\('\\\\nSample 5:'\); ['00','ARG17','BRA1','MEX10','FWC1'].forEach\(c=>{const s=d.find\(x=>x.code===c\); console.log\(c, '→', s?.imageUrl||'NONE'\);}\);")
